去.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 大 (man) + 口 (mouth/object); top simplified to 土, bottom to 厶.
去.difference: Our data classifies 去 as phono-semantic, but Wiktionary classifies it as an ideogrammic compound (會意) with no phonetic component.

法.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 氵 (water) + semantic 廌 (antelope) + abbreviated phonetic 盍; 廌 was later omitted.
法.difference: Our data classifies 法 as a compound ideograph (會意), but Wiktionary classifies it as a phono-semantic compound with phonetic 盍.

学.wiki_summary: Possibly phono-semantic: phonetic 爻 + phonetic 六; later 𦥑 and semantic 子 (child) were added.

如.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 女 + semantic 口 (mouth); phonetic component also carries ideographic suggestion of a woman obeying an order.
如.difference: Our data classifies 如 as a compound ideograph (會意), but Wiktionary classifies it as a phono-semantic compound with 女 as the phonetic component.

都.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 者 + semantic 邑 (town/city).

同.wiki_summary: Pictogram of a pipe, original form of 筒; 口 was added later to mark the opening.
同.difference: Our data classifies 同 as a compound ideograph (會意), but Wiktionary classifies it as a pictogram (象形) depicting a pipe.

现.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 玉 (jade) + phonetic 見.

当.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 尚 + semantic 田 (field), fields facing each other.

没.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 水 (water) + phonetic 𠬛.
没.difference: Our data classifies 沒 as a compound ideograph (會意), but Wiktionary classifies it as a phono-semantic compound with phonetic component 𠬛.

动.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 重 + semantic 力 (strength).
